scripts.start:prod: npm run release:prepare && npx prisma db push && node server.js
scripts.apk:publish-local: mkdir -p public/downloads && cp -f android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk public/downloads/latest.apk && cp -f android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk "public/downloads/YAM.apk" && npm run release:prepare
scripts.android:build: export JAVA_HOME="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home"; export ANDROID_SDK_ROOT="/opt/homebrew/share/android-commandlinetools"; export ANDROID_HOME="$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT"; export PATH="/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:$ANDROID_SDK_ROOT/platform-tools:$PATH"; cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
